query:
-- Check for hemadharshini's order on Mar 28 (amount 1281.00)
SELECT 
  o.orderNumber, o.customerName, o.customerPhone,
  o.totalAmount / 100 as totalRupees, o.paymentStatus, o.paymentMethod,
  o.razorpayPaymentId, o.orderStatus, o.orderType, o.createdAt
FROM orders o
WHERE DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-28' 
AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 128000 AND 128200
ORDER BY o.createdAt;

-- Check for monishgovind's order on Mar 21 (amount 824.50) - broader search
SELECT 
  o.orderNumber, o.customerName, o.customerPhone,
  o.totalAmount / 100 as totalRupees, o.paymentStatus, o.paymentMethod,
  o.razorpayPaymentId, o.orderStatus, o.orderType, o.createdAt
FROM orders o
WHERE DATE(o.createdAt) = '2026-03-21' 
AND o.totalAmount BETWEEN 82400 AND 82500
ORDER BY o.createdAt
